description: Polish cycle 3 on top of cycle 2. Remaining issues after manual rc-dock overlay hotfix (5f4e08d): dark theme not default, Command History ghost tab still renders from persisted layouts, panel content voids inside panes, active-tab state unclear, tab bar filler looks disconnected, workspace clipping. See tasks/prd-matslop-polish-3.md for narrative with reference screenshot /tmp/polish-cdp-03.png.

userStories.title: Change default theme mode from system to dark
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to open in dark mode by default even if my OS is set to light mode, matching the project's design baseline. First-launch inspection showed data-theme='light' applied because prefers-color-scheme returned light.
acceptanceCriteria: The seeded default for users with no stored preference is 'dark' (not 'system')
First launch with no config does not set data-theme='light' even when OS prefers-color-scheme is light
Users who previously picked light or system keep their stored preference
A unit or Playwright test documents the seeded default
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Actually kill the Command History ghost tab for persisted layouts
userStories.description: US-P06 added sanitizeSavedDockLayout but the ghost tab still renders. Either the sanitizer is not applied on the load path, or only during visibility-driven rebuilds that skip the first render.
acceptanceCriteria: sanitizeSavedDockLayout is applied to savedDockLayout in the useState initializer of MatslopDockLayout (first render) AND on every later rebuild
Migration: if an existing session.json or layout persistence file contains a tab id whose visibility is currently false, strip it on load and write the sanitized layout back
Playwright: load a fixture layout that includes matslop-command-history and assert the rendered DOM has zero [data-testid='dock-tab-matslop-command-history'] when commandHistory is false
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fill panel content to pane edges (no gray voids inside panes)
userStories.description: Cycle 2 made .panel fill the pane but inner containers still leave visible gaps. Screenshot /tmp/polish-cdp-03.png shows thin gray strips on the right edge of File Browser and Workspace and dead space below the Command Window prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: .fb-content fills its pane horizontally with no gray strip on the right
.ws-content fills its pane horizontally
.cw-output fills its pane vertically; the >> prompt anchors at the bottom with scrollable history above
Any padding/margin comes from the theme, not from a visible background mismatch
Playwright screenshot in dark mode: no contiguous rectangle larger than 4x4 inside any dock pane that is NOT part of the intended content background
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Distinguish active dock tabs visually
userStories.description: Every tab in every strip currently looks underlined (all appear active). rc-dock exposes both .dock-tab.dock-tab-active AND .rc-tabs-tab-active; US-P09 only targeted rc-tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: Only the active tab has the accent-color underline and bright text (both .dock-tab.dock-tab-active and .rc-tabs-tab.rc-tabs-tab-active selectors covered)
Inactive tabs use --text-secondary with no underline
Hover on an inactive tab uses --bg-hover + --text-primary
Playwright: in a pane with 2+ tabs, exactly one has dock-tab-active and exactly one has the inset box-shadow
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dock bar filler blends into tab strip
userStories.description: The empty area to the right of the last tab currently looks like a disconnected gray box because the filler has a different background from the tab bar.
acceptanceCriteria: The area after the last tab in every dock-bar uses the same background as .dock-bar (visual continuation of the strip)
The rc-tabs overflow button (.rc-tabs-nav-more / .dock-extra-content) is themed to match
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Workspace column min-width and overflow
userStories.description: The Workspace header text 'No variables in workspace' is partially clipped at the right edge when the column is narrow.
acceptanceCriteria: .ws-content has overflow: auto so long text can scroll instead of hard-clipping
Workspace column has a minSize in the rc-dock layout so it cannot shrink below ~180px
Header text wraps or truncates with an ellipsis rather than hard-clipping
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Clear stale persisted layout on version bump
userStories.description: As a user upgrading from a pre-polish build, I don't want a stale persisted layout to override the new polished defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: The layout persistence file stores a schema version field
On load, if the stored version is older than the current constant, the layout is discarded and defaults are applied (visibility preferences preserved where possible)
The constant is bumped by 1 in this story
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Run visual-polish E2E spec as exit gate
userStories.description: The visual-polish spec from US-P10 must pass as the exit gate for this cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test:e2e -- visual-polish passes on the polish-v2 branch after the cycle-3 fixes
Baseline screenshot updated to match the dark-theme polished state
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
